mano_cua.result_summary: React 18环境下boardgame.io单人模式Tic-Tac-Toe每次走棋后棋盘、当前玩家、回合数、gameover状态均即时更新渲染，无需手动刷新
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Tested Tic-Tac-Toe singleplayer: 5 moves made, each move instantly updated cells array, currentPlayer switched, turn incremented. Winner display and gameover object appeared immediately when top row completed. All game state bindings fully reactive with no delay.
